mapper.select: SELECT count(*) from companies WHERE business_no = #{business_no}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO company_users (company_user_id, company_id, login_id, password, name, phone, birth, email, status, gender, e_name, created_at) VALUES( SEQ_COMPANIES.NEXTVAL, #{company_id},#{login_id},#{password},#{name}, #{phone},#{birth},#{email},#{status},#{gender},#{e_name},SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO foreign_accounts_company ( account_id, account_pw, bank_name, account_no, company_id, account_status, limit_one_time, limit_daily) VALUES ( SEQ_FOREIGN_ACCOUNTS_COMPANY.NEXTVAL, #{account_pw}, #{bank_name}, #{account_no}, #{company_id}, #{account_status}, #{limit_one_time}, #{limit_daily} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM company_users WHERE Login_id = #{Login_id}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT ACCOUNT_NO FROM accounts_company UNION ALL SELECT ACCOUNT_NO FROM foreign_accounts_company UNION ALL SELECT ACCOUNT_NO FROM accounts_personal UNION ALL SELECT ACCOUNT_NO FROM foreign_accounts_personal ) combined_accounts WHERE TRIM(combined_accounts.ACCOUNT_NO) = #{account_no}
